data.title: Forgame Holdings Announces Share Placement to Raise HK$15.25 Million
data.description:
Forgame Holdings Ltd. ( (HK:0484) ) just unveiled an update.

Forgame Holdings Ltd. has announced a placement of new shares under a general mandate, aiming to raise approximately HK$15.25 million in gross proceeds. The funds will be used to upgrade production facilities and for general working capital, potentially enhancing the company’s operational capabilities and financial stability.

More about Forgame Holdings Ltd.

Forgame Holdings Ltd. is a company incorporated in the Cayman Islands, primarily involved in the technology sector, focusing on the development and distribution of online games. It operates within the digital entertainment industry, targeting a global market with its gaming products.

data.title: Harmony Biosciences Appoints Ron Philip to Board
data.description:
Harmony Biosciences Holdings ( (HRMY) ) has shared an update.

On April 2, 2025, Harmony Biosciences appointed Ron Philip to its Board of Directors, filling a vacancy left by Jack Bech Nielsen’s resignation in June 2024. Philip, who brings extensive experience from his roles at Orbital Therapeutics and Spark Therapeutics, will serve on the Audit and Nominating and Corporate Governance Committees. His appointment is expected to support Harmony’s growth and pipeline expansion, aligning with the company’s focus on innovative therapies for rare neurological diseases.

More about Harmony Biosciences Holdings

Harmony Biosciences is a pharmaceutical company focused on developing and commercializing innovative therapies for patients with rare neurological diseases. Established in 2017 by Paragon Biosciences, LLC, and headquartered in Plymouth Meeting, Pennsylvania, the company is committed to addressing unmet medical needs through novel science and visionary thinking.

data.title: Puma Alpha VCT Announces New Share Allotment
data.description:
Puma Alpha VCT Plc ( (GB:PUAL) ) has issued an update.

Puma Alpha VCT plc has announced a new allotment of 925,136 ordinary shares as part of its ongoing offer for subscription, aiming to raise up to £15 million, with an additional over-allotment facility of £5 million. The shares were priced between £1.0436 and £1.0866, based on the most recent net asset value per share. This issuance increases the total number of ordinary shares to 32,575,925, which also represents the total voting rights in the company. The new shares are set to be admitted to the London Stock Exchange, with trading expected to commence on or around 4 April 2025.

More about Puma Alpha VCT Plc

data.title: China Everbright Greentech Announces Key Leadership Changes
data.description:
China Everbright Greentech Ltd. ( (HK:1257) ) has provided an update.

China Everbright Greentech Limited announced a change in its company secretary and alternate authorised representative roles, effective April 22, 2025. Ms. CHOW Wing Man will resign, and Ms. KWONG Anita Wai Ni, with extensive experience in corporate governance and ESG qualifications, will assume these positions. This change reflects the company’s commitment to strengthening its corporate governance framework.

More about China Everbright Greentech Ltd.

China Everbright Greentech Limited is a company incorporated in the Cayman Islands with a focus on environmental protection and sustainable development. It operates in the green technology sector, providing services and products related to environmental governance and corporate sustainability.

data.title: Lifecare ASA Announces General Meeting for Strategic Discussions
data.description:
Lifecare AS ( (DE:LFC0) ) has provided an update.

Lifecare ASA has announced a General Meeting scheduled for April 24, 2025, which will be conducted both physically and digitally. Shareholders are required to register on the Orgbrain portal to participate and vote. This meeting is crucial for stakeholders as it may impact the company’s operations and strategic direction, particularly in advancing their CGM systems in the medical sensor industry.

More about Lifecare AS

Lifecare ASA is a medical sensor company focused on developing technology for sensing and monitoring various body analytes. Their primary product is the Continuous Glucose Monitoring (CGM) system, utilizing osmotic pressure as a sensing principle. The company’s sensor technology, known as ‘Sencell,’ is designed for identifying and monitoring a wide range of analytes and molecules in both humans and pets.

data.title: 7C Solarparken AG Initiates Share Buyback Program
data.description:
7C Solarparken ( (DE:HRPK) ) has issued an update.

7C Solarparken AG has announced a share repurchase program, intending to buy back up to 4,545,454 shares at a maximum price of EUR 2.20 per share, with a total expenditure not exceeding EUR 10 million. This strategic move, approved by the supervisory board, aims to optimize the company’s capital structure and potentially enhance shareholder value, with the flexibility to adjust or terminate the program as needed.

More about 7C Solarparken

7C Solarparken AG operates in the renewable energy sector, focusing primarily on the development and management of solar power plants. The company is involved in the production and distribution of solar energy, catering to the growing demand for sustainable energy solutions.

data.title: Empire State Realty Announces Board Member Retirement
data.description:
Empire State Realty ( (ESRT) ) has provided an announcement.

On March 31, 2025, Thomas J. DeRosa, a longstanding board member of Empire State Realty Trust, Inc., announced his intention to retire and not seek re-election at the upcoming Annual Meeting of Shareholders on May 15, 2025. His departure is not due to any disagreements with the company, and he will continue to serve until the meeting. DeRosa has been a director since the company’s IPO in 2013, and the board and management expressed their gratitude for his significant contributions.

More about Empire State Realty

Empire State Realty Trust, Inc. operates in the real estate industry, primarily focusing on owning, managing, and acquiring office and retail properties in Manhattan and the greater New York metropolitan area. The company is known for its iconic Empire State Building and is publicly traded on the New York Stock Exchange.

data.title: Golden Arrow Resources Files Technical Report for San Pietro Project
data.description:
An announcement from Golden Arrow Resources ( (TSE:GRG) ) is now available.

Golden Arrow Resources has filed a NI 43-101 Technical Report for its San Pietro Project in Chile, detailing the first mineral resource estimate. The report outlines inferred mineral resources for copper, gold, iron, and cobalt, indicating potential for further development. This filing positions Golden Arrow strategically within a burgeoning IOCG district, enhancing its prospects for future exploration and development activities.

More about Golden Arrow Resources

Golden Arrow Resources Corporation operates in the mining industry, focusing on the exploration and development of mineral resources. The company is involved in projects that target copper, gold, iron, and cobalt, with a particular emphasis on the San Pietro Copper-Gold-Iron-Cobalt Project in Chile.

data.title: SSY Group Advances SYN045 Tablets to Phase I Clinical Trials
data.description:
An update from SSY Group ( (HK:2005) ) is now available.

SSY Group Limited has announced the approval of its SYN045 tablets for Phase I clinical trials by the National Medical Products Administration of China. The approval includes three different specifications, which will enhance the clinical application and dosing precision of the drug. SYN045, a PGI2 receptor agonist, has shown promising results in preclinical studies with good targeting selectivity and safety, marking a significant step forward in the company’s drug development efforts.

More about SSY Group

SSY Group Limited is a company operating in the pharmaceutical industry, focusing on the development of chemical drugs. The company is involved in creating innovative medications, with a particular emphasis on targeting specific health conditions such as pulmonary hypertension.
